runs.title: B39 вҖ” Familjen вҖ” Barnfokus, Hamn, Livslogg
runs.excerpt:
Plattform: **Cursor** В· Agent-lГӨge. Jag lГӨser kanon och nuvarande Familjen/Hamn-kod innan jag delegerar till build-specialist-familjen.
Jag kГ¶r relevanta smoke-tester och delegerar till build-specialist-familjen fГ¶r att hitta luckor.
Subagenten har gjort ГӨndringar вҖ” jag verifierar diffen och kГ¶r ГҘterstГҘende smoke-tester.
**Plattform:** Cursor В· **Modell:** Composer В· **Typ:** faktiska ГӨndringar (fortifikation, minsta sГӨkra diff)

---

## 1. Vad som ГӨndrades

Delegerat till **build-specialist-familjen**. Scope: Barnfokus, Trygg Hamn, Livslogg вҖ” **6 filer**, inga routes/PMIR/Barnporten rГ¶rda.

| Fil | Г„ndring |
|-----|---------|
| `FamiljenBarnfokusDelegate.tsx` | `useEffect` nollstГӨller frГҘga/svar/epistemik vid barnbyte eller ГҘldersbracket вҖ” fixar att Kaspers frГҘga kunde hГӨnga kvar pГҘ Arvid |
| `FamiljenLivsloggTab.tsx` | Tabpanel `id` + `aria-labelledby` |
| `ChildMomentTabs.tsx` | Tab `id` + `aria-controls` |
| `ChildMomentStunderPanel.tsx` | Filterchips `aria-label` + `aria-pressed` |
| `FamiljenLivsloggStundDelegate.tsx` | Kategori-select `aria-label` |
| `FamiljenLivsloggObservationDelegate.tsx` | Kategori-select + epistemik `aria-pressed` |

**OfГ¶rГӨndrat (redan komplett):** `FamiljenInputSuperModule`, `TryggHamnHub`, `SafeHarborPage`, `barnfokusCatalog.ts`, WORM-spar via shell, embedded Hamn i `/familjen?tab=hamn`.

---

## 2. Smoke-resultat

| Script | Resultat |
|--------|----------|
| `smoke:hamn` | **PASS** |
| `smoke:child-moment` | **PASS** |
| `smoke:barn-epistemik` | **PASS** |
| `smoke:children` | **PASS** (live Firebase, ingen private_child-lГӨcka) |
| `smoke:locked-ux` | **PASS** |
| Linter (ГӨndrade filer) | **Inga fel** |

---

## 3. Blocker / SKIP

**Inga blockers.** Alla scope-smokes grГ¶na.

| SKIP (PMIR/spec) | Orsak |
|------------------|-------|
| Barnporten kanon-UI | PMIR |
| `firestore.rules`, `AppRoutes`, `sharedRules.ts` | PMIR |
| Full Brusfilter-wizard, "DГ¶lj tills energi" | Spec Fas 2 вҖ” delvis via BIFF + CalmCollapsible |

---

**Deploy:** none (enligt instruktion). Inget committat вҖ” sГӨg till om du vill ha commit.

runs.title: B39 вҖ” Wave gate smoke
runs.excerpt:
Plattform: **Cursor** В· Agent: **specialist-verifier** (read-only gate). Jag kГ¶r wave-smoke och verifierar mot kanon innan eval.
Wave-smokes ГӨr grГ¶na; jag skapar eval + unlock-doc fГ¶r module-lock-GAP (samma mГ¶nster som v37/v38).
**Plattform:** Cursor В· **Agent:** specialist-verifier (marathon-verifier) В· **Typ:** endast verifiering вҖ” ingen produktionskod

---

## Beslut: **GO**

Wave-gate B39 FAMILJEN godkГӨnd efter oberoende smoke + artefakt-audit.

---

### 1. Vad som ГӨndrades

**Inget i produktionskod** вҖ” ren gate-verifiering + governance-artefakter.

| Fil | Г„ndring |
|-----|---------|
| `docs/evaluations/build-v39.md` | Ny eval вҖ” smoke-matrix, artefakt-audit, verdict **GO** |
| `docs/evaluations/2026-07-14-unlock-MOD-FAM-HUB-b39-familjen-fortification.md` | Governance-fix вҖ” unlock fГ¶r MOD-FAM-HUB + MOD-FAM-BARN |
| `.orkester/cursor-yolo-state-v39.json` | `b39-gate` completed, `gateVerdict: GO`, nГӨsta вҶ’ `b39-vakt` |

**b39-build (verifierat):** 6 filer вҖ” Barnfokus child-reset, Livslogg a11y. Hamn ofГ¶rГӨndrad. Barnporten PMIR orГ¶rd.

---

### 2. Smoke-resultat

| Script | Resultat |
|--------|----------|
| `npm run smoke:children` | **PASS** вҖ” citations: 3, private leak: NO |
| `npm run smoke:hamn` | **PASS** вҖ” Trygg Hamn static guards |
| `npm run smoke:locked-ux` | **PASS** вҖ” Barnfokus, Valv, drawer, Planering, Widget, Barnporten |
| `npm run smoke:module-lock` | **PASS** (efter unlock-doc) |

---

### 3. Blocker

**Ingen blocker kvar.**

Initial **GAP** (`module-lock` utan unlock-doc) lГ¶stes retroaktivt вҖ” samma mГ¶nster som v37/v38. Ingen PMIR-rГ¶rd.

---

**NГӨsta i kГ¶n:** `b39-vakt` (yolo-vakt slutgate вҶ’ handoff v40).

runs.title: B39 вҖ” yolo-vakt slutgate
runs.excerpt:
Plattform: **Cursor** В· Agent: **yolo-vakt** (read-only slutgate). Jag kГ¶r smokes och delegerar till marathon-yolo-vakt fГ¶r GO/NO-GO.
**Plattform:** Cursor В· **Agent:** yolo-vakt (marathon-yolo-vakt) В· **Typ:** read-only audit + orkester-handoff

---

## Beslut: **GO**

Build v39 (FAMILJEN вҖ” Barnfokus, Trygg Hamn, Livslogg) ГӨr godkГӨnd. Handoff till **v40 INTEGRATION**.

---

### 1. Vad som ГӨndrades

**Produktionskod:** inget i denna vakt.

| Fil | Г„ndring |
|-----|---------|

| `.orkester/cursor-yolo-state-v39.json` | `completed: true`, `goNoGo: GO`, handoff вҶ’ v40 |
| `.orkester/cursor-yolo-queue-v40.json` | **Ny** вҖ” INTEGRATION wave-kГ¶ |
| `.orkester/cursor-yolo-state-v40.json` | **Ny** вҖ” `currentTaskId: b40-build` |
| `.cursor/pipeline/yolo-v40/START-PROMPT.md` | Handoff-prompt fГ¶r v40 |

**b39-build (verifierat):** 6 filer вҖ” Barnfokus child-switch reset, Livslogg a11y. Hamn ofГ¶rГӨndrad. Barnporten PMIR orГ¶rd.

---

### 2. Smoke-resultat

| Smoke | Resultat |
|-------|----------|
| `npm run smoke:children` | **PASS** вҖ” citations: 3, private leak: NO |
| `npm run smoke:hamn` | **PASS** вҖ” Trygg Hamn static guards |
| `npm run smoke:locked-ux` | **PASS** вҖ” Barnfokus, Valv, drawer, Planering, Widget, Barnporten |
| `npm run smoke:module-lock` | **PASS** вҖ” unlock-doc godkГӨnd |

---

### 3. Blocker

**Ingen.**

| SKIP | Orsak |
|------|-------|
| `b39-deploy` | PMIR вҖ” ingen explicit deploy-OK |

---

**NГӨsta steg:** `b40-build` вҖ” Integration dry-run (innehГҘll + seed). Startprompt: `.cursor/pipeline/yolo-v40/START-PROMPT.md`. **Aldrig `--apply`** pГҘ Kunskap-ingest.
